summary.conclusion: No saved mechanistic steering generation satisfies the minimum validation gate. The current evidence supports treating instruction-free language steering as empirically blocked for the tested Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct settings; the smallest next action is a new Modal run with a base non-instruction-tuned model or a larger chat-template-direction intervention.
